judgment.summary: A high-growth software business with robust margins, significant free cash flow, and an attractive valuation relative to growth.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was 0.97 vs an estimate of 0.97 (in line), with the next earnings date on 2026-07-22.
positives: PEG ratio 0.88 — suggests the stock is undervalued relative to growth.
Gross margin 76.6% — reflects high-quality software profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) $5.11B — demonstrates strong cash generation.
Forward P/E 18.80 vs trailing 56.23 — indicates significant expected earnings expansion.
negatives: Current ratio 0.84 — suggests potential short-term liquidity constraints.
Quick ratio 0.69 — indicates limited ability to cover immediate liabilities with liquid assets.
Earnings growth 2.3% — shows relatively low bottom-line expansion.
